mapper.select: SELECT U.user_no, U.user_id, U.user_name, U.user_type, U.app_status, U.acc_status, U.company_cd, U.email, U.phone, U.address, C.biz_number, U.position, C.company_name, C.company_phone, C.customs_num, U.reg_dtime FROM TB_USERS U LEFT JOIN TB_COMPANIES C ON U.company_cd = C.company_cd ORDER BY U.reg_dtime DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_USERS SET app_status = 'APPROVED', acc_status = 'ACTIVE', upd_id = #{updId}, upd_dtime = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_type = 'MASTER'

UPDATE TB_USERS SET app_status = 'REJECTED',
reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reject_dtime = NOW(), upd_id = #{adminId}, upd_dtime = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT status_nm statusNm, curr_status_cd currStatusCd, reason reason, reg_id regId, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dtime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDtime FROM TB_USER_HISTORY WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY reg_dtime DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_USERS SET acc_status = #{accStatus}, upd_id = #{updId}, upd_dtime = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USERS WHERE user_id = #{userId}
